title: Catch the Wave
artist: Def Tech (bilingual reference; original by kz/livetune)

lines.ja: Catch the wave
lines.en: Catch the wave

lines.ja: It started with a vibe from you
lines.en: It started with a vibe from you

lines.ja: Friendship first, my dream come true
lines.en: Friendship first, my dream come true

lines.ja: We entered to that precious place
lines.en: We entered to that precious place

lines.ja: Where peace and trust melt into grace
lines.en: Where peace and trust melt into grace

lines.ja: But my fate has played a trick on me
lines.en: But my fate has played a trick on me

lines.ja: Forever last this cannot be
lines.en: Forever last this cannot be

lines.ja: I love you enough to let you go
lines.en: I love you enough to let you go

lines.ja: Waves upon waves upon waves, high and low
lines.en: Waves upon waves upon waves, high and low

lines.ja: オンショアでグジャグジャな時がある
lines.en: オンショアでグジャグジャな時がある

lines.ja: オフショアで肩 頭な波もある
lines.en: オフショアで肩 頭な波もある

lines.ja: 無風でドパーフェクトな日もあれば
lines.en: 無風でドパーフェクトな日もあれば

lines.ja: ピーカンなのにフラットもあるのが
lines.en: ピーカンなのにフラットもあるのが

lines.ja: 自然さ it's like
lines.en: 自然さ it's like

lines.ja: 人生さ 辛く
lines.en: 人生さ 辛く

lines.ja: 苦しい時があるから
lines.en: 苦しい時があるから

lines.ja: 笑顔になれるんだ だから
lines.en: 笑顔になれるんだ だから

lines.ja: Catch the wave 感じて
lines.en: Catch the wave 感じて

lines.ja: その手を合わせて
lines.en: その手を合わせて

lines.ja: 合致して負けないで
lines.en: 合致して負けないで

lines.ja: みんなだって悩んで
lines.en: みんなだって悩んで

lines.ja: Catch the wave, cast away
lines.en: Catch the wave, cast away

lines.ja: All your fear into the air
lines.en: All your fear into the air

lines.ja: Don't delay, no leeway
lines.en: Don't delay, no leeway

lines.ja: No matter what they say, we just don't care
lines.en: No matter what they say, we just don't care

lines.ja: 太陽からもらっているエネルギー
lines.en: 太陽からもらっているエネルギー

lines.ja: 自然の恵みと香り
lines.en: 自然の恵みと香り

lines.ja: 海の風 山の小川 森を浴びて
lines.en: 海の風 山の小川 森を浴びて

lines.ja: 小鳥とアコギ
lines.en: 小鳥とアコギ

lines.ja: Feeling the vibe we strum
lines.en: Feeling the vibe we strum

lines.ja: Taking in that natural beauty
lines.en: Taking in that natural beauty

lines.ja: It's really a dream for me
lines.en: It's really a dream for me

lines.ja: Floating in the ocean's soul you'll see
lines.en: Floating in the ocean's soul you'll see

lines.ja: We will always be together
lines.en: We will always be together

lines.ja: When you gaze into the mirror
lines.en: When you gaze into the mirror

lines.ja: You see yourself but not your inside
lines.en: You see yourself but not your inside

lines.ja: じゃあ how can I and I what's sitting in your heart?
lines.en: じゃあ how can I and I what's sitting in your heart?

lines.ja: When you show no feeling?
lines.en: When you show no feeling?

lines.ja: You can see reflections of your soul
lines.en: You can see reflections of your soul

lines.ja: When you face nature around you
lines.en: When you face nature around you

lines.ja: It's in the tears of rain, our Earth's pain
lines.en: It's in the tears of rain, our Earth's pain

lines.ja: It's a pity you can't see a leaf is dying
lines.en: It's a pity you can't see a leaf is dying

lines.ja: This ends a new, your chance has come to truth
lines.en: This ends a new, your chance has come to truth

lines.ja: Your stars are finally shining
lines.en: Your stars are finally shining

lines.ja: So let's paddle away, take off and ride the wave
lines.en: So let's paddle away, take off and ride the wave

lines.ja: The good, oh, good, oh, good sets are coming
lines.en: The good, oh, good, oh, good sets are coming
